description: I.Q. from park avenue for men has a refreshing and long lasting fragrance that comes in a whimsical red flacon. All the three indispensable elements of a fragrance: base, body and head are proportioned accurately giving a rare and exotic deodorant.Quantity: 150 mlCautionFlammableProtect from sunlightDo not apply on irritated or broken skinKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatKeep away from eyesIf rash develops, discontinue use
